series_metadata.series_description: This is the record that shows payment of agency expenses; the actual bill and the listing of expenses are attached where appropriate; payroll records are also covered by this schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 2 complete fiscal years current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than . ; Electronic: 2 complete fiscal years current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than
